usecase: Targeted "does this new run clash?" probe.
notfor: Full model or view-scoped — use the other Run commands.
precondition: Active document; selection (resolver or active) of ≥ 1 element.
logictree:
1) ids = Resolver_ElementIds OR current selection (active view). WireError if empty.
2) set_a = resolve ids → Elements; drop nulls.
3) set_b = all MEPCurves + MechanicalEquipment in doc minus set_a ids.
4) pipeline.Run(doc, "selection_vs_rest", set_a, set_b).
5) Emit per_pair + total_upserted.

preprompts: Running clashes for selection vs. rest of model…
